name: Potato-Cabbage Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam potatoes in 1 inch boiling water for 30 to 40 minutes, or until tender.
2. Slice potatoes, unpeeled, into 1/2-slices; set aside.
3. Cook bacon in a large skillet until crisp; set aside.
4. Pour off all but 2 tablespoons of bacon fat.
5. Saute onion in the same skillet until golden.
6. Stir in flour, thyme, and salt.
7. Gradually add beer and milk; stir over low heat until the mixture boils and thickens.
8. In a 3-quart casserole, layer half the cabbage, potatoes, bacon, cheese, and sauce; repeat with remaining ingredients.
9. Cover and bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 30 minutes.
10. Uncover and bake an additional 15 minutes, or until cabbage is tender.
